A blog about bitcoin.

Bitcoin related Resources

This is just a short list of the resources in the bitcoin space that are at top of mind for me.

Recommended Books

  • Gradually, then Suddenly - by Parker Lewis
  • Broken Money - by Lyn Alden
  • The Bitcoin Standard - by Safedean Amous
  • The Price of Tomorrow - by Jeff Booth
  • Abundance Through Scarcity - by Ioni Appelberg
  • Proof of Money - by Terrence Michael
  • The Hidden Cost of Money - by Seb Bunney
  • The Genesis Book - by Aaron Van Wirdum
  • A Progressive's Case for Bitcoin - by C. Jason Maier
  • The Big Print - by Larry Leopard

Recommended Podcasts

  • Bitcoin Unleashed - Oliver Velez
  • What Bitcoin Did - Danny Knowles
  • BTC Sessions
  • Natalie Brunell
  • Robin Seyr
  • The Hurdle Rate Podcast (hosted by Swan Bitcoin)
  • Rajat Soni, CFA
  • The Bitcoin Matrix Podcast

Recommended Products

  • Cold Card
  • Sparrow Wallet
  • Aqua Wallet

Recommended Businesses

  • River
  • Zaprite
  • The Bitcoin Way
  • Strategy
  • Strive Asset Management
